name: Wonderful Layered Peach Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1. FOR CRUST: Combine flour, sugar, and pecans in a bowl. Add melted butter and mix well. Press the mixture into the bottom of a 13 x 9 baking dish. Bake at 350°F for 18-20 minutes, then cool.
2. FOR FILLING: In a large bowl, beat cream cheese until light and fluffy. Gradually add powdered sugar, beating well. Stir in whipped topping and almond flavoring. Drain the peaches and fold into the whipped topping mixture. Pour over the cooled crust and chill for several hours.
